2606.16617.title: Sycophancy as Material Failure under Pushback Loading: A Multi-Axis Characterization Across Three Loading Cases and up to Seventeen Material Charges
2606.16617.paper_summary: Sycophancy in LLMs is documented across 70+ papers, but expert agreement on construct boundaries remains low (ICC=.184; Ye et al., 2026). The construct fragments because behavioral classification depends on which surface form is privileged. We adopt a materials-science framing: conversation as test specimen under load, LLM-model as material charge, pushback as progressive load, stance-flip as material failure. We characterize this failure across three loading cases (debate n=1000; false-presuppositions n=3400; ethical-setting n=3400; 10-17 material charges per case; 7800 specimens total) using 14 turn-level axis-measurements spanning velocity, damage accumulation, frame-drift, brittleness, and direction stability, plus three speaker-resolved axes from an independent pipeline. The measurements are Hooke-coupled ($σ= E \cdot \varepsilon$ analog) and reproduce across loading cases with effects up to $|r_{rb}| = 0.35$ on debate; the sign structure adds a second pattern: the ethical-setting case inverts the velocity and accumulation blocks. Variance composition partitions into two profiles: debate is charge-dominated (brittle-fracture-like: the material grade decides), false-presuppositions and ethical-setting are topic-dominated (creep-like: the load decides); the ratios (2.03 vs 0.13/0.17) are estimator-dependent, for debate even in direction. Cross-judge reliability (GPT-4o vs Haiku 4.5) shows debate scoring is judge-robust (Cohen's $κ= 0.88$) while false-presupposition scoring is judge-sensitive ($κ= 0.36$) -- a caveat single-judge benchmarks must report. This is the methodological move Ye et al.'s diagnosis calls for: a multi-axis characterization that does not depend on which surface form of the construct one privileges.
2606.16617.paper_summary_zh: 在大型語言模型中的諂媚行為已在70多篇論文中被記錄，但專家對於構念邊界的共識仍然較低（ICC=.184；Ye et al., 2026）。構念的碎片化是因為行為分類取決於哪一種表面形式被優先考慮。我們採用材料科學的框架：對話作為承載載荷的測試樣本，LLM模型作為材料載荷，反推作為漸進載荷，立場翻轉作為材料失效。我們在三種載荷情況下對這種失效進行特徵化（辯論 n=1000；錯誤前提 n=3400；倫理設定 n=3400；每個案例10-17個材料載荷；總共7800個樣本），使用14個回合級別的軸向測量，涵蓋速度、損傷累積、框架漂移、脆性和方向穩定性，以及來自獨立管道的三個講者解析軸。這些測量是胡克耦合的（$σ= E \cdot \varepsilon$ 類比），並在載荷情況下重現，對辯論的影響高達 $|r_{rb}| = 0.35$；符號結構增加了第二種模式：倫理設定案例反轉了速度和累積區塊。變異組成分為兩個輪廓：辯論是載荷主導（類似脆性斷裂：材料等級決定），錯誤前提和倫理設定則是主題主導（類似蠕變：載荷決定）；比率（2.03 對 0.13/0.17）依賴於估計器，對辯論甚至在方向上也是如此。跨評委可靠性（GPT-4o 對 Haiku 4.5）顯示辯論評分是評委穩健的（Cohen's $κ= 0.88$），而錯誤前提評分則對評委敏感（$κ= 0.36$）——這是單一評委基準必須報告的警告。這是Ye et al.的診斷所要求的方法論轉變：一種不依賴於優先考慮構念的哪一種表面形式的多軸特徵化。
2606.16617.author: Ferdinand M. Schessl et.al.
